banner_matchers.value:
^HTTP/1\.1 200 OK
(?:[^
]+
)*?Server: cPanel
Content-Length: 0
Connection: Keep-Alive
Allow: UNLOCK,HEAD,MOVE,OPTIONS,LOCK,POST,PUT,COPY,MKCOL,GET,DELETE,PROPFIND

DAV: 1,2,<http://apache\.org/dav/propset/fs/1>
Keep-Alive: timeout=15, max=96
MS-Author-Via: DAV

]+

]*

Content-Length: 0

MS-Author-Via: DAV
